- Ketu Ashtotthara or Kuja - Ketu Ashtotthara or Durga
Kavacha to ward off the blemishes. Sometimes by flattering or
commending the higher authorities and listening to their words
the trouble can be warded off.
LEAVING THE JOB DUE TO UNBEARABLE
HARASSMENT:
When transit Saturn transits over natal Mars + Ketu
and if Jupiter is not posited in 5th or 9th to. this Mars +
Ketu the native has to leave the-Job compulsorily.
Change ofPlace in profession:
When transit Saturn transits over natal Moon the native
will have change of place in profession. Sometimes when transit
Saturn transits over the 3rd, 71 h house to Moon, the change of
place in profession takes place.
ELEVATION /PROGRESS IN PROFESSION;
When transit Saturn transits over natal Jupiter the native
will have elevation in his profession. At the same time if Sun's
aspect is also there he will get the special authority in his
elevation. If Moon is also posited along with Jupiter, in addition
.
